prompt: Create a 4-panel vertical luxury fashion poster featuring the identical model (long black hair, light complexion) in each section, set on a continuous reflective black studio floor with edge lighting. Left to right: Mustard background: Gold halter slit-gown, gold heels and bag. Grey background: Black double-breasted suit, lace top, black pumps and bag. Crimson background: Red cape-gown with gold embroidery, gold clutch. Navy background: White textured 3-piece suit, white heels and bag. Style: Ultra-realistic, high-contrast editorial photography, fashion week magazine aesthetic, masterpiece.
